title: Stoopid log event
description: Single structured log event emitted by stoopid-logging packages (Python, TypeScript, Rust). The shape is identical across languages. See docs/adrs/0004-shared-logging-json-schema.md and docs/adrs/0008-log-event-trace-id-and-context-shape.md.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC timestamp with millisecond precision, ending in 'Z' (e.g. 2026-05-05T17:42:11.123Z).

level.description: Severity level. Lowercase. The five values listed are the only permitted values.

service.description: Service name. Sourced from OTEL_SERVICE_NAME (preferred) or SERVICE_NAME.

version.description: Service version. Sourced from SERVICE_VERSION or service.version in OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES.

trace_id.description: W3C Trace Context trace ID, lowercase hex. Auto-populated from the ambient OpenTelemetry context when present; omitted otherwise.

span_id.description: W3C Trace Context span ID, lowercase hex. Auto-populated from the ambient OpenTelemetry context when present; omitted otherwise.

logger.description: Optional logger name (e.g. module path). Useful for filtering by emitter.

error.description: Structured error info. Reserved field; populated when an exception is logged. Shape is intentionally open at v0.1.0.

context.description: Caller-supplied bound or extra fields. Open shape; users may add anything. Omitted from the emitted event when empty.
